command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== MORENO-DELEGATE VERSION AND HELP ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     '/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate --version 2>/dev/null || /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --help 2>&1 | head -30'

echo '=== DELEGATOR CONFIG ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     'cat /home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps({k:d[k] for k in ["version","workers"] if k in d}, indent=2))"'

echo '=== CHECK QUEUED JOB ==='
JOB_ID="job-20260625T053228Z-16ca7671"
PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "
import json, base64
p = {'action':'get_job_status','job_id':'$JOB_ID','origin':'test','requested_by':'jose'}
print(base64.b64encode(json.dumps(p).encode()).decode())
")
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --payload-b64 '$PAYLOAD'" 2>&1

echo '=== JOB STATE DIR ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     'ls /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/ 2>/dev/null | head -10; ls /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/jobs/ 2>/dev/null | head -10'

echo DONE_1911
